DALL-E Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

OpenAI's image generator, built directly into ChatGPT.

MakerOpenAI
CategoryAI Image Generators
PricingIncluded with ChatGPT Plus ($20/mo); limited free use in ChatGPT
Free tierYes
WebsiteVisit DALL-E →

Best for

Users who already use ChatGPT and want inline image generation.

Pros

  • Seamless integration with ChatGPT for iterative editing
  • Good at following detailed, literal prompts
  • Free tier lets you try it inside ChatGPT

Cons

  • Less stylistically distinctive than Midjourney
  • Free usage limits reset periodically

Alternatives to DALL-E

Midjourney

One of the most popular AI image generators, known for highly artistic, polished output.

Leonardo AI

AI image generation platform popular with game artists and designers.

Runway

Professional-grade AI video generation and editing suite.
